title: The Egg Maker
body:
Thanks to this mod, you can produce spawn eggs.

With the mod, a new resource, tin, is added to the game. This ore is used only in the recipe of machines and in the production of bronze.

Bronze ore is only used in the construction of one machine.

Production sequence of machines:

Mechanical Press

Advanced Oven

DNA Extractor


Mechanical Press: Used to press ores

Advanced Furnace: Used for bronze making and additional processes

DNA Extractor: Extracts the DNA map of a mob


You can produce spawn eggs using the DNA map at the Smithing Table.

MOB FARMS:

You can obtain resources by using mob farm blocks with spawn eggs.



Tutorial:
[https://youtu.be/MQ_uYzqUuk4](https://youtu.be/MQ_uYzqUuk4)
